creator: stargrave@stargrave.org
text:
Created attachment 165943
Update patch from 5.2 to 5.3

Update GoVPN to 5.3. Minor bug fixed with newclient.sh utility:

    Fixed minor bug with newclient.sh that caught "Passphrase:" prompt
    and inserted it into example YAML output. Just replaced stdout
    output to stderr for that prompt.
